inspection_point_equipment_and_hygiene.row_predicate: ((("category" = 'Food Equipment and Utensil' OR "category" = 'Wash and Waste Water Disposal') OR ("category" = 'Toilet / Hand Washing Facilities For Customers' OR "category" = 'Toilet and Hand Washing Facilities for Staff')) OR (rowid IN (34,36,38,40,41)))

inspection_point_pest_control_compliance.row_predicate: (("category" = 'Insect and Rodent Control' OR ("category" = 'Compliance' OR "category" = 'Food Equipment and Utensil Sanitation')) OR (rowid IN (9,11,23,26)))

inspection_point_other_categories.row_predicate: (("category" IS NULL OR "category" NOT IN ('Food Protection', 'Food Maintenance', 'Food Equipment and Utensil', 'Insect and Rodent Control', 'Compliance', 'Food Equipment and Utensil Sanitation', 'Toilet / Hand Washing Facilities For Customers', 'Toilet and Hand Washing Facilities for Staff', 'Wash and Waste Water Disposal')) OR (rowid IN (7,8,29)))

vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
